description: Send a message to a chat session with source/note context and get an AI reply (POST /api/chat/execute).
rules: remote-mutating: appends a message to a live chat session and invokes the configured AI model
INCLUDE_SOURCES / INCLUDE_NOTES (default true) control which context is attached
writes the AI response JSON to record_store/chat_response.json
degrades gracefully (status=unreachable, exit 0) when the server is down
usage: Set OPEN_NOTEBOOK_URL, SESSION_ID, CHAT_MESSAGE (INCLUDE_SOURCES, INCLUDE_NOTES, MODEL_OVERRIDE optional). Output: chat_response.json.
limitation: Requires a reachable Open Notebook server with a configured AI provider; needs an existing SESSION_ID (see chat_session_create).

vars.CHAT_MESSAGE: What are the key biomarkers for immunotherapy response?
